name: Geargiaccelerator
desc: If you control a "Geargia" monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Defense Position. When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: You can target 1 "Geargia" monster in your Graveyard, except "Geargiaccelerator"; add that target to your hand.
mnst_eff: If you control a "Geargia" monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Defense Position. When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: You can target 1 "Geargia" monster in your Graveyard, except "Geargiaccelerator"; add that target to your hand.
eff: If you control a "Geargia" monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Defense Position. When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: You can target 1 "Geargia" monster in your Graveyard, except "Geargiaccelerator"; add that target to your hand.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
